<<The total revenue from sourdough is 50 loaves multiplied by $4 per loaf.>>

<<The total revenue from whole wheat is 30 loaves multiplied by $5 per loaf.>>

<<The total revenue from rye is 40 * 3 = 120 dollars.>>  
<<The total revenue from whole wheat is 30 * 5 = 150 dollars.>>  

<<The total revenue from all bread is 200 + 120 + 150 = 470 dollars.>>  
<<The total revenue from all bread is 470 dollars.>>
